projectDescription: Ruffus is a digital loyalty stamp card platform that lets local businesses create branded loyalty programs accessible via web, Apple Wallet, Google Wallet, and PWA — no hardware or POS integration required.
keyFeatures: Branded digital stamp loyalty cards (web, PWA, Apple Wallet, Google Wallet)
No hardware or POS integration required — just a printed QR code
Real-time merchant analytics dashboard (visits, top customers, redemptions)
Automated reward reminders when customers are one stamp away
Multiple loyalty cards per business (seasonal promos, tiers)
Verified stamp scanning — prevents screenshot fraud and duplicate codes
Multi-location support with consolidated analytics (Growth & Custom plans)
Email campaigns and automated win-back emails
14-day free trial, no credit card required
publicApiSurface: Loyalty card creation (stamp count, reward, branding)
QR code generation and printable poster
Customer stamp collection via QR scan
Apple Wallet / Google Wallet pass issuance
Merchant analytics dashboard (members, stamps, rewards, visit trends)
